pageContext.name: Ultramarines Primaris Lieutenant Amulius
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy proudly present the Ultramarines Primaris Lieutenant Amulius 1:18 Scale Collectible Figure!  Lieutenants act as the right hands of their Captains by providing tactical flexibility and helping to direct their battle-brothers in war! From Warhammer 40,000 comes a warrior clad in decorative blue armor! Recreate decisive battles with this intricately designed Joy Toy Warhammer 40,000 Ultramarines Primaris Lieutenant Amulius 1:18 Scale Action Figure.   Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
